summary: 本周GitHub Trending共收录 70 个热门项目，新上榜 70 个，以TypeScript项目为主（14个），主要集中在AI工具/LLM应用（35个）、其他（12个）方向，榜首ai-job-search作为本周AI工具/LLM应用方向的明星项目登顶（3716 stars），反映出开发者对AI工具和智能体的持续旺盛需求。

top_10.title: MadsLorentzen/ai-job-search
top_10.content: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.

top_10.title: sponsors/Zackriya-Solutions
top_10.content: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (

top_10.title: sponsors/mattpocock
top_10.content: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

top_10.title: sponsors/VoltAgent
top_10.content: A collection of DESIGN.md files analysis by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.

top_10.title: sponsors/Dicklesworthstone
top_10.content: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.

top_10.title: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
top_10.content: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation require
